channel.title: Words and Bytes
channel.description: Recent content on Words and Bytes

item.title: About
item.description: 👋 Hi, I’m Cody. I’ve been writing code professionally since 2010. I enjoy learning new things, and I like to write about the topics I’m learning as a way to help internalize the information. If you have questions or comments about anything I’ve written, feel free to reach out to me on Twitter @codygrep.
